summary: Finished matching sysdolphin/baselib/lobj.c by replacing the remaining lobj.s assembly with C, adding/cleaning LObj APIs and headers, and renaming several previously address-based HSD_LObj functions to semantic names used across stage, UI, and fighter callsites. The diff removes asm/sysdolphin/baselib/lobj.s and its obj_files.mk entry, rewrites HSD_LObjSetupInit and LObjLoad in C, adds default-class/allocation/load/animation helpers, introduces active-light management helpers, and adds GX_LIGHT_AMBIENT for the 0x100 light ID. There were no PR body or review comments in the slice, so intent beyond matching lobj.c is inferred from the title and diff.

key_files.role: Primary matched C implementation; replaces inline/standalone assembly with C for light setup, loading, animation, class init/release, active-light tracking, and semantic LObj accessors.
Deleted remaining assembly for lobj.c, including LObjLoad.
Updated declarations, inlined HSD_LObjGetPriority, renamed APIs, added allocation/load/default-class and active-light prototypes, and corrected HSD_LightAnim pointer types.
Added static inline HSD_WObjUnref helper used by lobj release and WObj replacement setters.
Added GX_LIGHT_AMBIENT = 0x100 so light ID/index conversion code can use a named constant.
Removed the assembly object entry after lobj.s was deleted.
Callsite symbol updates from address-based HSD_LObj names to semantic SetColor/GetColor/SetDistAttn names.
Callsite symbol updates for HSD_LObjGetColor, HSD_LObjSetColor, and HSD_LObjSetDistAttn.
Callsite symbol updates for HSD_LObjGetColor, HSD_LObjSetColor, HSD_LObjSetDistAttn, and HSD_LObjSetSpot.
Callsite symbol updates for HSD_LObjSetColor, HSD_LObjSetSpot, and HSD_LObjSetDistAttn.
Corrected call label from HSD_LObjAddAnim to HSD_LObjAddAnimAll.
Corrected call label from HSD_LObjAddAnim to HSD_LObjAddAnimAll.
Updated LObj animation and SetColor call labels.
Adjusted C callsites for the renamed HSD_LObjSetColor signature.

what_changed: Deleted asm/sysdolphin/baselib/lobj.s, which contained 667 lines of remaining assembly, and removed the corresponding assembly object entry from obj_files.mk.

Reimplemented HSD_LObjSetupInit in C, including light mask initialization, active-light clearing, current_lights traversal, hidden-light skipping, diffuse/specular filtering, ambient fallback handling, setup of specular follow-up lights, and final HSD_LObjSetup calls.
Added HSD_LObjSetActive and HSD_LObjClearActive to centralize active_lights and nb_active_lights bookkeeping; ambient lights are placed at GX_MAX_LIGHT - 1 and get HSD_Index2LightID-derived IDs.
Split setup logic into static helpers including setup_diffuse_lightobj and setup_infinite_lightobj, while making setup_spec_lightobj, setup_point_lightobj, and setup_spot_lightobj static in lobj.c.

Renamed address-style functions to semantic APIs: HSD_LObj_80366CA4 became HSD_LObjSetColor, HSD_LObj_80366CB0 became HSD_LObjGetColor, HSD_LObj_80366CBC became HSD_LObjSetSpot, and HSD_LObj_80366CD0 became HSD_LObjSetDistAttn.
Changed HSD_LObjSetColor to take GXColor by value rather than GXColor*, with downstream C and assembly callsite labels updated accordingly.
Added attenuation setter helpers HSD_LObjSetAttnA, HSD_LObjSetAttnK, and HSD_LObjSetAttn for raw light attenuation parameters.
Added default-class and allocation/load support via HSD_LObjSetDefaultClass, HSD_LObjGetDefaultClass, HSD_LObjAlloc, static LObjLoad, and HSD_LObjLoadDesc.

Added animation loading helpers HSD_LObjAddAnim and HSD_LObjAddAnimAll; multiple existing assembly callsite labels were corrected from HSD_LObjAddAnim to HSD_LObjAddAnimAll where the code operates over linked light/animation lists.
Added WObj pointer replacement helpers HSD_LObjSetPositionWObj and HSD_LObjSetInterestWObj, and an inline HSD_WObjUnref helper in wobj.h.
Added LObjRelease, LObjAmnesia, and LObjInfoInit class hooks, including release of aobj, position WObj, and interest WObj, plus default_class/current_lights cleanup on amnesia.
Updated HSD_LightID2Index and HSD_Index2LightID to use named GX_LIGHT* constants and added GX_LIGHT_AMBIENT = 0x100 to GXEnum.h.
Moved HSD_LObjGetPriority into lobj.h as an inline with HSD_ASSERT, and simplified HSD_LObjAddCurrent's priority comparison to call the inline directly.
Replaced several string-symbol assert calls with HSD_ASSERT or __assert(__FILE__, line, "0") style assertions in the matched C.
smart_moves: Factored the huge HSD_LObjSetupInit assembly into small C helpers for diffuse, infinite, point, spot, and specular setup, which makes the matched control flow easier to reason about and reuses logic for masks and GX setup.

Introduced HSD_LObjSetActive instead of duplicating the ambient-vs-nonambient active_lights indexing pattern; this captures the important special case that ambient uses slot 8 / light ID 0x100 while regular lights increment nb_active_lights.
Named GX_LIGHT_AMBIENT in GXEnum.h rather than leaving raw 0x100 literals in HSD_LightID2Index and HSD_Index2LightID, making the light-ID mapping self-documenting.
Updated all dependent assembly labels after symbol renames, preserving cross-file linkage while improving searchability of the decompiled API.
Separated HSD_LObjAddAnim from HSD_LObjAddAnimAll and corrected callsites that walk whole LObj/LAnim chains, avoiding misleading symbol names.
Kept matching-specific quirks where needed, such as the duplicated assignment `x = x = lobj->shininess;` in setup_spec_lightobj and the guarded uninitialized-index fallback in HSD_LightID2Index.
Used class/default-class helpers and HSD_LOBJ_METHOD load dispatch in HSD_LObjLoadDesc, matching the baselib object model rather than hardcoding all allocations to hsdLObj.
Centralized WObj ownership release through HSD_WObjUnref before replacing position/interest WObj pointers, making lifetime behavior explicit in the matched C.
decomp_lessons: When a remaining asm file is mostly object-system boilerplate plus a few complex routines, matching can be unlocked by first reconstructing class init/release/load methods and then deleting the asm object only after all callsites and headers agree.

Address-based HSD symbols should be renamed once argument behavior is clear from callsites: SetColor takes a GXColor value, GetColor writes to a pointer, SetSpot sets cutoff/spot function, and SetDistAttn sets point attenuation fields.

For baselib object descriptors, load functions may need to dispatch on desc flags and class_name: use hsdSearchClassInfo/hsdNew when a class name exists, otherwise use the default class allocation path.
Light setup matching depends on faithfully modeling GX light index semantics: regular hardware lights are indices 0-7, while ambient is represented as index 8 / ID 0x100 in this code.
Moving tiny accessors like HSD_LObjGetPriority to headers as inline functions can resolve matching and callsite shape while also exposing the assertion contract.

Do not assume raw numeric enum values should remain raw in matched code; adding a named enum like GX_LIGHT_AMBIENT can improve both readability and matching stability if the constant is already semantically clear.
Preserve compiler quirks under MUST_MATCH or directly in C when they affect codegen, as shown by the duplicated shininess assignment and TODO around an uninitialized variable fallback.
When decompiling linked-list APIs, distinguish single-node operations from All variants; symbol names should reflect whether the implementation iterates with next_p over object and animation chains.
Header struct cleanup matters for matching and API correctness: HSD_LightAnim was changed to use HSD_LightAnim* and HSD_WObjAnim* directly, and HSD_LightPointDesc no longer carried spot-only fields.
naming_conventions: Use semantic HSD_LObj verb names instead of address suffixes: HSD_LObjSetColor, HSD_LObjGetColor, HSD_LObjSetSpot, HSD_LObjSetDistAttn.
Use `All` suffix for linked-list-wide operations such as HSD_LObjAddAnimAll, matching existing HSD_LObjAnimAll and HSD_LObjReqAnimAll naming.
Use GX enum constants for light IDs: GX_LIGHT0 through GX_LIGHT7, GX_LIGHT_AMBIENT, and GX_LIGHT_NULL instead of raw 1/2/4/.../0x100/0.
Use static lowercase helper names for internal lobj.c setup routines, e.g. setup_diffuse_lightobj, setup_infinite_lightobj, setup_point_lightobj, setup_spot_lightobj, and setup_spec_lightobj.
Use class API names that mirror baselib object patterns: HSD_LObjSetDefaultClass, HSD_LObjGetDefaultClass, HSD_LObjAlloc, HSD_LObjLoadDesc.
Prefer HSD_ASSERT(line, expr) in baselib C when the file context is implicit and keep __assert(__FILE__, line, "0") for explicit impossible/default switch cases.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Deleted the standalone lobj.s only after replacing LObjLoad and the large HSD_LObjSetupInit asm block with matching C.
Used helper extraction to control compiler output for a large function rather than attempting one monolithic C translation of HSD_LObjSetupInit.
Kept a known codegen oddity in setup_spec_lightobj: `x = x = lobj->shininess;` is documented by the existing TODO and retained in the matched source.
Preserved a MUST_MATCH guard around the HSD_LightID2Index default-path initialization workaround, acknowledging the original uninitialized local behavior.
Updated assembly call labels without changing instruction bytes where only the symbol name changed, improving the disassembly map for still-asm files.

Used static globals for lobj.c state (`current_lights`, `active_lights`, `nb_active_lights`, light masks, and default_class`) instead of extern declarations once the C file owned the matched implementation.
Matched light setup by expressing the original bit tests as named flag checks such as LOBJ_HIDDEN, LOBJ_DIFFUSE, LOBJ_SPECULAR, LOBJ_ALPHA, LOBJ_RAW_PARAM, and LOBJ_TYPE_MASK.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching HSD_LObjSetupInit or lobj.c for refinements to the matched helper structure.
Search for remaining address-style HSD_LObj_80366* symbols after PR 978 to identify follow-up naming cleanups.
Check future changes to GX_LIGHT_AMBIENT or GX_MAX_LIGHT handling to confirm ambient slot semantics remained stable.
Search for HSD_WObjUnref changes to see whether the inline helper was later moved to a C file or generalized.
Look for later review or issue discussion around HSD_LObjSetColor taking GXColor by value versus pointer.
